name: External Components
description: You can easily import community or personal components using the external components feature. Bundled components can be overridden using this feature.

config_entries.label: Password
config_entries.description: Password for the Git server, if one is required

config_entries.label: Username
config_entries.description: Username for the Git server, if one is required

config_entries.label: Path
config_entries.description: Path to use when using local components. See [Local](https://esphome.io/components/external_components#external-components_local).

config_entries.label: Ref
config_entries.description: Git ref (branch or tag). If not specified the default branch is used.

config_entries.label: Components
config_entries.description: The list of components to use from the external source. By default, all available components are used.

config_entries.label: Refresh
config_entries.description: The interval the source will be checked. Has no effect on local. See Refresh. for more info. Defaults to 1day. .
